notes: Third diagnostic-driven clean split for motions/Video1.
Compared with v2, this only removes one additional training-set follow-through outlier from 5_penalty7.
Validation-only OOD motions are not removed here; they should be included in final all-data prior training unless visual review rejects them.

exclude_motions.reason: Dominant OOD source in prestrike and follow after v1 filtering.

exclude_ranges.reason: Follow-through OOD begins before the v1 cut; extend the removed range earlier.
Initial approach OOD spike in the first windows.
Train-split follow-through outlier after v2 filtering.
